execution_id.description: Unique identifier for each execution of the CLI.

speakeasy_api_key_name.description: Identifier of the Speakeasy API key.

local_started_at.description: Timestamp when the event started, in local time.

local_completed_at.description: Timestamp when the event completed, in local time.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the event was created in the database.

success.description: Indicates whether the event was successful.

duration_ms.description: Duration of the event in milliseconds.

gh_action_run_link.description: Link to the GitHub action run.

gh_pull_request.description: The reference to a created pull request URL.

gh_changes_committed.description: Whether or not changes were committed from generation in the Github Action.

git_user_name.description: User's name from git configuration. (not GitHub username)

git_remote_default_repo.description: Default repository name for git remote.

git_relative_cwd.description: Current working directory relative to the git root.

generate_target_name.description: The workflow name of the target.

generate_gen_lock_id.description: gen.lock ID (expected to be a uuid).

management_doc_checksum.description: Checksum of the currently Rendered OpenAPI document.

management_doc_version.description: Version taken from info.version field of the Rendered OpenAPI document.

generate_version.description: Version of the generation logic used.

generate_config_pre_version.description: The version of the customer's SDK before we generated

generate_config_post_version.description: The version of the customer's SDK that we just generated

generate_config_pre_checksum.description: Checksum of the configuration file (prior to generation)

generate_config_post_checksum.description: Checksum of the configuration file (post generation)

generate_gen_lock_pre_doc_version.description: info.Version of the Previous Rendered OpenAPI document (prior to generation, via gen lock)

generate_gen_lock_pre_doc_checksum.description: Checksum of the Previous Rendered OpenAPI document (prior to generation, via gen lock)

generate_gen_lock_pre_version.description: Artifact version for the Previous Generation

generate_gen_lock_pre_revision_digest.description: Revision digest of the Previous Generation

generate_gen_lock_pre_blob_digest.description: Blob digest of the Previous Generation

generate_gen_lock_pre_namespace_name.description: Namespace name of the Previous Generation

generate_bump_type.description: Bump type of the lock file (calculated semver delta, custom change (manual release), or prerelease/graduate)

generate_number_of_operations_ignored.description: The number of operations ignored in generation.

generate_number_of_operations_used.description: The number of operations used in generation.

generate_number_of_terraform_resources.description: The number of terraform resources used in generation.

generate_published.description: Indicates whether the target was considered published.

generate_repo_url.description: Expected Repo URL, for use in documentation generation.

publish_package_registry_name.description: Name of the registry where the package was published.

source_revision_digest.description: The revision digest of the source.

source_blob_digest.description: The blob digest of the source.

source_namespace_name.description: The namespace name of the source.

lint_report_digest.description: The checksum of the lint report.

lint_report_error_count.description: The number of errors in the lint report.

lint_report_warning_count.description: The number of warnings in the lint report.

lint_report_info_count.description: The number of info messages in the lint report.

openapi_diff_report_digest.description: The checksum of the openapi diff report.

openapi_diff_base_source_revision_digest.description: The revision digest of the base source.

openapi_diff_base_source_blob_digest.description: The blob digest of the base source.

openapi_diff_base_source_namespace_name.description: The namespace name of the base source.

openapi_diff_breaking_changes_count.description: The number of breaking changes in the openapi diff report.

openapi_diff_bump_type.description: Bump type of the lock file (calculated semver delta, or a custom change (manual release))

error.description: Error message if the event was not successful.

last_step.description: The last step of the event.
